name: Sesame Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from pork; cut into 1 inch cubes and set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine cornstarch, teriyaki sauce, and sesame seeds. Mix until the mixture is very stiff.
3. Add the pork cubes to the cornstarch mixture and let stand for 30 minutes.
4. Prepare the Sweet & Sour Sauce (see below) and keep warm.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat until it reaches 300°F (150°C).
6. Carefully add 1/3 of the pork cubes to the hot oil and cook, stirring constantly, for about 2 minutes or until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Repeat step 6 with the remaining pork cubes.
8. Serve immediately with warm Sweet & Sour Sauce.
Sweet & Sour Sauce:
1. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, vinegar, catsup, water, teriyaki sauce, and cornstarch.
2. Cook over high heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
